title: poa fawcettiae
intro: Poa fawcettiae, also known as Fawcett's meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa fawcettiae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
